{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Galactic Union Intelligence
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Galactic Union Intelligence]] believed [[Herta]] was a specialist in viral engineering.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17">''The Pilot'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“If you’re gifted in prosthetics, then why does Galactic Union Intelligence seem to believe that you’re a specialist in viral engineering?”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
